title: Get back to Jann about DB — early-OSU vision-manifest todo
html:
TL;DR

  • October 6, 2021 — Yahir's first full term at OSU — todos: *finish essay for WR121, go to mom situation after 5?, meeting in KEC 1003, get SimNet, get calendar right, what is the vision you want to manifest.....*
  • Trailing in the same note: a draft Ford-brother outreach — "Hey Will, sorry I haven't hit you up earlier dude. Anyways, as a Ford brother I invite you to grab some grub wherever. Let's make it happen!!" — friendly, low-friction, network-building inside the Ford cohort.
  • "what is the vision you want to manifest....." — Yahir's earliest explicit vision-manifest prompt-to-self in the corpus; same genre as 2021 12 27 whats now year-end and the manifesto style notes that bracket it.
  • KEC 1003 = Kelley Engineering Center room 1003, a CS / engineering meeting space. SimNet = the ubiquitous OSU business-Excel/Office certification platform. Both are concrete BIS-major artifacts placing Yahir squarely in the early-OSU stack.
  • "get back to Jann about DB" (the title) is one of the third-mention triggers promoting Jann from name-drop to dedicated entity in this sweep.

Source quote

"-finish essay for WR121 / -go to me situation after 5? / -meeting in KEC 1003 ? / -get simnet / -get calendar right / -what is the vision you want to manifest....."

"Hey Will, sorry I haven't hit you up earlier dude. Anyways, as a Ford brother I invite you to grab some grub wherever. Let's make it happen!!"

Open questions

  • "DB" in the title — Disability Benefit? Department Bursar? A scholarship form Jann is processing? The shorthand isn't decoded elsewhere.
  • "go to me situation" — likely typo for "go to mom situation"; what was happening at home in early-Oct 2021 requiring an after-5 visit?
  • Who is Will? Single mention; appears to be a Ford-cohort brother — Potential Entities candidate.
